# Management Vision 2035
[ Explore the Vision ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/ir/library/plan)
[ Watch the Presentation ](https://youtu.be/b9Z4oKh8s5A)
##  Featured Insight 
Rebuilding the foundations of competitiveness and trust for the intelligent systems era
AI agents, physical AI, and quantum computing boost competitiveness while expanding risks such as credential misuse. This article explores redesigning management foundations to integrate growth and trust.  

[ Read the full article ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/insight/tl-rebuilding_the_intelligent_systems_era-20260525)
## Customer stories
[ Japanese Food Manufacturer in Singapore](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories/cs-japanese-food-manufacturer-in-singapore-20260521)
Fujitsu deployed Microsoft Dynamics 365 SCM using a clean core approach, enhancing core processes and providing ongoing support to optimize daily operations.
![](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/customer-stories/cs-japanese-food-manufacturer-in-singapore-20260521/cs-japanese-food-manufacturer-in-singapore-20260521-809x500.jpg?rev=eddfa6a2f66947bc80f41882dfb24658&hash=2FDE43B069ACA0B8CD2A711D5495672D)
[ Environment Protection Authority Victoria](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories/cs-environment-protection-authority-victoria-20260422)
Fujitsu implemented ServiceNow Integrated Risk Management (IRM) with expert advisory services to streamline compliance operations. This had been supported by a comprehensive Organisational Change Management (OCM) program which supported EPA to change their ways of working.
![](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/customer-stories/cs-environment-protection-authority-victoria-20260422/cs-environment-protection-authority-victoria-20260422-809x500.jpg?rev=7b4e0a7330934468bd51151f51978f23&hash=67836B1D50FF436688C6289A09376B5A)
[ Thai Bridgestone Co., Ltd.](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories/cs-thai-bridgestone-20260326)
The Fujitsu team was professional and adaptable to our requirements, supporting us in efficiently normalizing and uploading our data to the cloud.
![](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/customer-stories/cs-thai-bridgestone-20260326/cs-thai-bridgestone-20260326-809x500.jpg?rev=ce3b4d0029e54228b2db14bd8a05e64f&hash=D1EEB8C25B05DAFBF181158FEBE8BB04)
[ Read Uvance Customer Stories ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories?tags=Fujitsu%20Uvance|Sustainable%20Manufacturing|Consumer%20Experience|Healthy%20Living|Trusted%20Society|Digital%20Shifts|Business%20Applications|Hybrid%20IT)

[ Fujitsu Way ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/about/corporate/philosophy)

##  We leverage technology to solve challenges and deliver a positive impact on society
[ ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/sustainability)
![An image of sunlight streaming into a vast forest](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/sustainability/sustainability_contents_bg_2740x3046.jpg)
## Insight
> Our goal is a 'Sovereign Platform' that puts customers in full control—from networking and computing to the entire software stack
[ A strategic overview of Fujitsu's latest technology and R&D endeavors ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/insight/tl-technology-update-20251224)
> Having achieved a staggering 100-fold boost in productivity through internal implementation, this platform represents a paradigm shift that elevates human-AI collaboration to a new dimension.
[ Rewriting the rules of software development   
—Fujitsu’s AI is putting rocket fuel into software development— ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/insight/tl-leadership-ai-20260217)
[ Explore the latest insights ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/insight)
## Featured
[ Fujitsu Quantum](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/technology/research/quantum)
Fujitsu is leading the business with quantum computers in 2030.
![Fujitsu's 256-qubit superconducting quantum computer](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/technology/research/quantum/kv-quantum-936x578.png?rev=dc0a2bcdf35a43ab9cef4f3c8ca99659&hash=4ABB75414BC3D6B29FE1473E07641EA5)
[ Autonomous systems force leaders to grow up](https://corporate-blog.global.fujitsu.com/fgb/2026-05-18/01/)
Autonomous systems force leadership to define accountability, decision limits, and trust now - before governance gaps become visible failures.
![A woman stands confidently in front of a group of attentive people, engaging them with her presentation.](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/redirects/corporate-blog/fgb-2026-05-18-01_809x500.jpg?rev=96c2a39b1def4b19a503fcf7537886e6&hash=675877BED09A482F4DB6154D73A4D14B)
[ Technology that truly accelerates business](https://corporate-blog.global.fujitsu.com/fgb/2026-04-16/01/)
In today’s digital economy, acceleration is everything—but it’s often misunderstood.
![A blue light trail arcs in front of a city skyline, highlighting the urban landscape against a darkening sky.](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/redirects/corporate-blog/fgb-2026-04-16-01_809x500.jpg?rev=bd2a6b8546cd4b01bbfba91a7803182c&hash=F42E9E75EF35A9F6C277BA41D1B4631D)
